accountId.description: The primary key of the account resource and the unique identifier for the account

address.description: The account holder's address available at the profile and account levels

phoneNumber.description: The account holder's phone number available at the profile and account levels

providerAccountId.description: The primary key of the provider account resource

holder.description: The holder entity is account-specific and captures the ownership status and the name details of the user

email.description: The account holder's email ID available at the profile and account levels
